home.hero3_subtitle: A trusted manufacturing partner for international standard resorts, villas, and restaurant interiors.

home.brand_p2: By combining the beauty of natural materials and modern construction standards, we ensure every product is not just furniture, but a valuable and durable masterpiece.
home.why_subtitle: Supported by experienced craftsmen and adequate facilities to handle large-scale or exclusive projects.

home.f2_desc: Full freedom in designing furniture that adapts to your space and character.
home.f3_desc: More than 20 expert artisans in Bali & Central Java fully dedicated to quality.
home.f4_desc: Production capacity of 50-100 furniture pieces per month, ready to serve projects on time.
home.col_subtitle: Explore our various product categories designed with modern aesthetics and high-quality materials.

home.c2_desc: Sturdy dining table with a combination of teak wood and hollow iron.
home.c3_desc: Weather-resistant pool furniture for villas and hotels.
home.craft_desc: Every piece of wood goes through a strict selection process, is precision-crafted by skilled hands inheriting traditional woodworking techniques, and is perfected with modern finishing standards.
home.final_title: Ready to bring your vision to life?
home.final_desc: Let's discuss your furniture project needs with our expert team.

about.hero_desc: Dedicating ourselves to the art of authentic Indonesian teak woodworking to create custom, high-value, and durable furniture masterpieces.
about.legacy_p1: Originating from a love for the natural beauty of teak wood, Kriya Kayu Nusantara was born as an appreciation for traditional woodworking techniques combined with modern design standards. We understand that furniture is not just space filler, but a reflection of the owner's character and lifestyle.
about.legacy_p2: As a trusted manufacturing partner, we have served a variety of clients ranging from premium homeowners, architects, interior designers, to hotel and villa developers. We build this trust through consistency in maintaining material quality, precision in craftsmanship, and on-time delivery.
about.workshop_subtitle: Adequate production facilities to handle projects with high levels of complexity.
about.w1_desc: More than 20 expert craftsmen based in Bali and Central Java, each with decades of experience in the art of woodworking teak.
about.w2_desc: Production capacity reaches 50 to 100 furniture units per month, ensuring both large and small scale projects can be completed on time.
about.w3_desc: Using only the finest selected teak wood (Grade A) that has undergone a Kiln Dry process to ensure maximum stability and durability.
about.why_subtitle: Our commitment is to exceed your expectations at every stage of production.
about.why1_desc: We guarantee transparent communication and regular progress reports.
about.why2_desc: Design, size, and even materials can be fully customized to your needs.
about.why3_desc: The touch of authentic Indonesian craftsmen giving a unique character to each furniture piece.
about.why4_desc: Full support from design consultation to on-site installation processes.
about.cta_desc: Our team of specialists is ready to help bring your design vision to life.

craftsmanship.hero_desc: Uncompromising dedication to every detail of craftsmanship to produce functional works of art.
craftsmanship.process_subtitle: From wooden logs to masterpieces, every step is performed with a high degree of meticulousness.
craftsmanship.p1_desc: We only select the best Grade teak wood. A strict selection process ensures each wood piece has a beautiful grain, is free from defects, and has the ideal maturity level to be processed into durable furniture.
craftsmanship.p2_desc: To prevent shrinkage and cracking, our teak wood goes through a Kiln Dry process to reach a moisture content (MC) of 10-12%. This is the key to stable furniture in various weather conditions.
craftsmanship.p3_desc: Our expert craftsmen cut, assemble, and join each component with high precision. Using strong traditional joint techniques combined with modern machinery for perfect results.
craftsmanship.p4_desc: Some of our collections use natural rattan. Weaving is done manually by skilled workers, producing neat, tight patterns, and providing high aesthetic value to the product.
craftsmanship.p5_desc: Repeated sanding processes are carried out to obtain a very smooth surface. Then, premium quality finishing materials are applied that highlight the beauty of the wood grain while providing maximum protection.
craftsmanship.quality_desc: At Kriya Kayu Nusantara, quality standards are not just a slogan, but a work culture. Every product goes through a strict Quality Control (QC) stage before being sent to the customer. We ensure that the furniture you receive is not only beautiful to look at, but also comfortable to use and lasts for generations to come.

services.hero_desc: Comprehensive solutions from the idea stage to perfectly installed furniture in your room.
services.s1_desc: In-depth discussions about your vision, style, and space needs to formulate the ideal furniture concept.
services.s2_desc: Visualizing ideas in the form of technical working drawings and 3D renderings to ensure every detail meets expectations before production begins.
services.s3_desc: Consultation on selecting teak wood grade, rattan type, and other complementary materials (fabric, foam, hardware) according to budget and designation.
services.s4_desc: Exclusive production process by experienced craftsmen in our facility, turning designs into real premium quality furniture.
services.s5_desc: Determining color and topcoat type (finishing) to obtain the desired aesthetic appearance while providing optimal protection.
services.s6_desc: Safe delivery services and professional installation at your project location to ensure furniture is installed perfectly.
services.cta_title: Have a Specific Idea for Your Project?
services.cta_desc: Our team is ready to help translate your sketches or design references into elegant and sturdy teak furniture.

projects.hero_desc: See firsthand how our work brings prestigious spaces to life.
projects.p1_desc: Complete teak wood furniture procurement for 5 premium villa units. Including beds, wardrobes, dining table sets, and outdoor loungers.
projects.p2_desc: Custom headboard, nightstands, and reception desk with rattan weaving details that highlight a contemporary tropical nuance.
projects.p3_desc: Custom furniture for the living room and family room, featuring a sofa with an exposed teak frame and a solid slab coffee table.
projects.p4_desc: Commercial bar stools and dining tables with iron and teak wood construction specifically designed for high durability in public areas.
